headline: Dexcom Further Advances Vision of Glucose Biosensing for All
summary: SAN DIEGO, June 23, 2026--DexCom, Inc. (NASDAQ: DXCM), the global leader in glucose biosensing, today announced at Aspen Ideas: Health a series of milestones that advance its vision of making glucose biosensing more accessible. Notably, the company announced pediatric clearance for the Stelo Glucose Biosensor and the launch of its fully reimagined Stelo app experience in July for Apple iPhone and Android users in the United States.

content.title: Dexcom Further Advances Vision of Glucose Biosensing for All

(NASDAQ: DXCM), the global leader in glucose biosensing, today announced at Aspen Ideas: Health a series of milestones that advance its vision of making glucose biosensing more accessible. Notably, the company announced pediatric clearance for the Stelo Glucose Biosensor and the launch of its fully reimagined Stelo app experience in July for Apple iPhone and Android users in the United States.

thumbnail.caption: At Aspen Ideas: Health, Dexcom announced regulatory milestones, including pediatric clearance for Stelo, further advancing access to glucose biosensing in the United States.
